text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

83 
DSCHRG_DT 
LABEL: 
Date beneficiary was discharged or died 
DESCRIPTION: The date on which the beneficiary was discharged or died. 
SHORT NAME: DSCHRGDT 
LONG NAME: DSCHRG_DT 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field comes from the highest claim thru date that is present on the claim records included in the 
stay, where the claim status code is other than '30'
